decision: Andon event loop — priority-queued signals so Jeff can judge state at a glance

steps.notes: Road-sign symbols shipped: ⬡ blocked, ▲ waiting, ● active. Stale-card fallback in enrichment. Jeff confirmed all states render correctly.

Reviewed and verified. Priority hierarchy correct (blocked>waiting>active), road-sign symbols render with override logic, stale-card fallback safe (<60s), event loop sound (single board query, per-role enrichment). Jeff confirmed states render. Ship-ready.
